name: 100 MG Etoposide Capsules IP
about: 100 MG Etoposide Capsules IP is a general medicine used for the treatment of various types of cancer such as lung cancer, testicular cancer, and lymphomas. These capsules come in a physical form of capsules and need to be stored in a cool place. Each box contains 4 capsules with a dosage of 100mg per capsule. The medicine is manufactured in India and can be purchased from an exporter, supplier, or trader. It is essential to take the medicine as per the doctors suggestion to avoid any side effects.

faq.a: The drug type of 100 MG Etoposide Capsules IP is general medicine.

faq.q: What is the packaging quantity per box?
faq.a: The packaging quantity per box is 4 capsules.

faq.a: The dosage guidelines are as per the doctors suggestion.

faq.a: The medicine needs to be stored in a cool place.
This medicine is manufactured in India.
